instruction: Restore the small cyan dot on the cursor arrow rays icon in the top-right (circle cx=112, cy=16, r=2, fill #06b6d4).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cursor-arrow-rays.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.042 21.672 13.684 16.6m0 0-2.51 2.225.569-9.47 5.227 7.917-3.286-.672ZM12 2.25V4.5m5.834.166-1.591 1.591M20.25 10.5H18M7.757 14.743l-1.59 1.59M6 10.5H3.75m4.007-4.243-1.59-1.59"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cursor-arrow-rays.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.042 21.672 13.684 16.6m0 0-2.51 2.225.569-9.47 5.227 7.917-3.286-.672ZM12 2.25V4.5m5.834.166-1.591 1.591M20.25 10.5H18M7.757 14.743l-1.59 1.59M6 10.5H3.75m4.007-4.243-1.59-1.59"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#06b6d4" cx="112" cy="16" r="2" />
</svg>
